query:
SELECT 
  roi.id, roi.receivingOrderId, roi.productId, roi.expectedQuantity, roi.receivedQuantity,
  roi.status, roi.labelCode,
  p.sku, p.description, p.unitsPerBox,
  pc.factorToBase, pc.unitCode AS conversionUnit
FROM receivingOrderItems roi
JOIN products p ON p.id = roi.productId
LEFT JOIN productConversions pc ON pc.productId = roi.productId AND pc.tenantId = roi.tenantId
WHERE roi.tenantId = 30001
  AND roi.status NOT IN ('received', 'completed')
LIMIT 20;
